manifests.title: Agent System
manifests.description: Agent types, model configurations, execution metrics, and admin settings for the OpenAgentic multi-agent platform.

manifests.title: DLP Scanner
manifests.description: Data Loss Prevention scanner with 55 detection rules across 5 categories, scanning at 5 points in the data flow.

manifests.title: MCP Tools
manifests.description: 23 MCP servers providing 165 tools for cloud management, observability, GitHub, knowledge, and platform administration.

manifests.title: Chat Pipeline
manifests.description: Chat message processing pipeline with 16 stages handling authentication, validation, prompt engineering, MCP tools, completion, and response streaming.

manifests.title: LLM Providers
manifests.description: Multi-provider LLM routing with 8 provider types, failover, load balancing, and per-provider metrics.

manifests.title: Authentication
manifests.description: Unified token validation supporting 4 token types across 6 auth provider configurations.

manifests.title: Agent Orchestration
manifests.description: Multi-agent orchestration with 4 execution patterns, 4 aggregation strategies, and adaptive turn limits per role.

manifests.title: Agent Configuration
manifests.description: Agent spawn configuration with 11 role prompts, sub-agent lifecycle, and tier-based model routing.

manifests.title: Semantic Tool Selection
manifests.description: Intelligent tool selection with 3-tier search, intent-priority routing, and score-gap cutoff (max 15 tools per request).

manifests.title: OAT Synth
manifests.description: Dynamic tool synthesis framework: natural language intent to synthesized tool with human-in-the-loop approval, risk classification, and user credential injection.

manifests.title: Workflow Engine
manifests.description: Workflow execution engine with 45 node types across 9 categories, supporting retry, fallback, circuit breakers, and human approval gates.

manifests.title: Workflow Scheduling
manifests.description: Cron-based workflow scheduling with setInterval polling, 5-field cron expression parsing, and configurable throughput limits.

manifests.title: HITL Approvals
manifests.description: Human-in-the-loop approval store for tool call gating with timeout, resolve, and cleanup lifecycle.

manifests.title: Audit Trail
manifests.description: Immutable audit logging with 33 entry fields, query types, and hash-chain tamper detection.

manifests.title: API Routes
manifests.description: 702 HTTP routes across 199 route files, organized by directory.

manifests.title: Database Schema
manifests.description: Prisma schema with 169 models, 2602 fields, and 255 relations.

manifests.title: Environment & Secrets
manifests.description: Helm values configuration and application secret definitions.

manifests.title: Deployment Configuration
manifests.description: Helm chart with 12 services, autoscaling, ingress, and pod disruption budgets.

manifests.title: Observability Dashboards
manifests.description: 12 Grafana dashboards with 138 panels covering service health, LLM performance, logs, and platform metrics.

manifests.title: Code Mode (OpenAgentic)
manifests.description: OpenAgentic manager with 14 classes, 78 interfaces, and 14 WebSocket handlers.

manifests.title: Admin Portal
manifests.description: Admin portal with 0 navigation sections and 0 views.

manifests.title: Composable Prompt System
manifests.description: Modular prompt composition with 29 seed modules, multi-stage pipeline, and slider-controlled budget allocation.

manifests.title: SSE Stream Events
manifests.description: 0 normalized stream event types across 0 categories, with 5 type guards.

manifests.title: OpenAgentic CLI
manifests.description: Interactive terminal-based AI coding assistant with Ink UI, tool execution, and multi-model support.

manifests.title: OpenAgentic LLM SDK
manifests.description: TypeScript SDK for interacting with the OpenAgentic LLM API, including provider-specific adapters for Bedrock and Vertex.

manifests.title: GhostPilot
manifests.description: Headless browser testing and UX automation tool with Express API, WebSocket control, and Puppeteer-based browser interaction.

manifests.title: MCP Proxy Service
manifests.description: MCP proxy service with 30 API routes, 24 classes, and 49 management functions.

manifests.title: Agent Frameworks (CrewAI & LangGraph)
manifests.description: Agent orchestration frameworks with 78 documented components across 15 CrewAI and 14 LangGraph source files.

manifests.title: OAT Executor
manifests.description: Open Agent Tool executor with 22 documented components across 6 source files.

manifests.title: Helm Chart Templates
manifests.description: 158 Kubernetes resources across 21 template groups in the OpenAgentic Helm chart.
